title: Ominous Bottle Backport
body:
### **Backports functional(ish) ominous bottles to Fabric-1.20.1.** - **Gives Bad Omen effect.** - **Raid Captains drop when killed.** - **Brewable to upgrade the effect tier.** - **Craftable from 8 emeralds and a glass bottle in the middle.** Made for my friends as a learning experience due to no mods like this with fabric compatibility.
Expect horrible quality.
